reviews.comment:
No lo puedo creer soy socio del año 1998, la sede central no podes entrar al baño tanto de damas como caballeros, una mugre total y no de un rato de HACE rato, domingo a media mañana

(Translated by Google)
I can't believe it, I've been a member since 1998. At the main office, you can't even use the restrooms, neither the men's nor the women's. It's absolutely filthy, and not just recently, it's been like this for ages, even on a Sunday morning.

reviewReply.comment: Le pedimos disculpas pero no tenemos quejas de los mismos y tenemos personal permanente gracias
